digest.greeting: Wednesday, June 3, Jean. Today is anchored by the Salesforce Program Overview, the EPMO Team Meeting, and the 4:00 PM Isaac Gomez Ventura interview. You have 9 calendar blocks, 5 urgent items, and 19 unchecked items carried forward from Tuesday's daily digest. Outlook calendar and email access worked; broad Teams recent-thread discovery returned a Microsoft 403, so Teams highlights use a narrower Teams search and Teams activity email fallback.

items.label: Follow up with TLs on CoE guide
items.detail: Dar seguimiento a los Team Leads sobre su revisión del CoE Brief Guide con sus PMs/PEs. Janet confirmed her team; verify the remaining Team Leads.

items.label: KPIs - confirm final approval
items.detail: Mid-Year Touchpoints launched in Rippling. Confirm all KPIs are approved/finalized after the KPI Review with Sara and close this out.

items.label: Respond to Sara - PMO/Salesforce dependencies
items.detail: Sara Watson flagged this as high priority. Shannon and Nadia need Salesforce Revenue and Sales Cloud MVP dates; identify PMO projects with Salesforce dependencies.

items.label: Review CoE Announcement draft status
items.detail: Sara Watson requested feedback on the CoE announcement draft. Confirm whether it went out and provide any remaining input.

items.label: Complete Nadia's project affected-areas request
items.detail: Completar la solicitud de Nadia Wilson sobre las areas afectadas en los proyectos del EPMO. Today's Salesforce Program Overview can support this.

items.label: Write to Chelsea and Lucia - Incident Response follow-ups
items.detail: Hacer follow-up con Chelsea y Lucia sobre los pendientes del proceso de Incident Response. The survey launch is scheduled, but remaining process follow-ups still need closure.

items.label: Review Isaac Gomez Ventura interview materials
items.detail: Project Coordinator interview is today at 4:00 PM EDT with Eugenia Barragan and Jean. Review candidate profile, resume, and cover letter before joining.

items.label: Interview - Isaac Gomez Ventura
items.detail: Unread candidate details arrived from Ana Oquendo/Rippling for today's Project Coordinator interview. Review materials and be ready to submit feedback.

items.label: FW: PMO Projects - Salesforce Dependencies
items.detail: From Sara Watson. High priority. Shannon and Nadia need Salesforce Revenue and Sales Cloud MVP dates; Jean must identify which PMO projects have Salesforce dependencies.

items.label: CoE Announcement draft - feedback requested
items.detail: From Sara Watson. Draft announcement for the Case Management Center of Excellence; confirm whether feedback is complete and the announcement was sent.

items.label: Follow up with TLs on CoE Brief Guide review
items.detail: Dar seguimiento a los TLs restantes sobre la revisión del CoE Brief Guide con sus PMs/PEs.

items.label: Review today's candidate materials
items.detail: Isaac Gomez Ventura interviews at 4:00 PM. Review candidate profile, resume, and cover letter links and be ready to submit feedback.

items.label: Confirm Jhara's Venn setup priority path
items.detail: Jhara said Venn setup on her Mac still was not working and asked Jean to help prioritize with Drew. Confirm the ticket is moving and whether stakeholders were notified.

items.label: Close Salesforce dependency response
items.detail: Sara's PMO/Salesforce dependency request remains the highest-priority carry-over. Send or confirm the response with affected PMO projects and MVP date context.

items.label: Clean up completed carry-overs
items.detail: Several Monday items were marked complete in EOD narrative but not all are reflected as completed in briefing state. Confirm and check off any remaining stale items.

items.label: Interview - Armando Diaz Hernandez
items.detail: From Ana Oquendo/Rippling. Tuesday's Project Coordinator interview materials remain unchecked in the prior digest; confirm feedback was submitted or close it out.

items.label: Interview - Astrid Ortega Hernandez
items.detail: From Ana Oquendo/Rippling. Tuesday's Project Coordinator interview materials remain unchecked in the prior digest; confirm feedback was submitted or close it out.

items.label: Interview - Isaac Gomez Ventura email
items.detail: Candidate materials are in Outlook for today's Project Coordinator interview at 4:00 PM EDT. Review before the afternoon meeting.

items.label: Jhara - Venn setup on Mac still blocked
items.detail: Jhara reported the Venn setup issue and related file-access behavior. Confirm the resolution path and whether the team needs a status update.
